channel.title: Cariboo Saturday Morning — Cariboo Mix
channel.description: A curated Saturday morning radio experience drawn from CBC podcasts (World Report, BC Today, Kamloops News, q, Unreserved), with Canadian indie music transitions from Jamendo. Assembled automatically each Saturday for the Cariboo region of BC.
channel.itunes:author: Cariboo Signals
channel.itunes:summary: A curated Saturday morning radio experience drawn from CBC podcasts (World Report, BC Today, Kamloops News, q, Unreserved), with Canadian indie music transitions from Jamendo. Assembled automatically each Saturday for the Cariboo region of BC.
